name: Planche Progression
description: Master the planche, an advanced calisthenics skill requiring exceptional upper body strength.

name: Front Lever Progression
description: Build the strength needed for the front lever position.

name: Muscle-Up Progression
description: Learn to perform muscle-ups on a bar or rings.

name: Handstand Progression
description: Build the strength and balance for a solid handstand.

name: Pull-Up Mastery
description: Progress from first pull-up to advanced variations.

name: Push-Up Mastery
description: Progress from basic push-up to advanced variations.

name: Dip Mastery
description: Build up to parallel bar dips and advanced variations.

name: Core Power
description: Develop exceptional core strength for all calisthenics skills.
